kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get WebElement
kw.doc: Returns the first WebElement matching the given ``locator``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: arguments[0].scrollIntoView(); By using argument: '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="8c82f9aa4aab3efd993f01e1deceb25d", element="f.CBD5C68DC4DC544C639E16CE30DF8E5C.d.66C01EE5332503B08505A87B297A9A92.e.398")>'

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
